conceptClusters.title: Retrieved native controls language and hierarchy
exitEvidence: Learner retrieves native task behavior, primary and bounded language scopes, and content-derived heading hierarchy before collecting data.
Learner repairs a custom-control substitution, wrong language scope, and changed form-section outline without copying earlier work.

conceptClusters.title: Form ownership entry lists and bounded submission
exitEvidence: Learner derives form owner, action, method, submitter, control name, value, checked or selected state, enabled state, and the exact constructed entry list from a bounded collection purpose.

Learner minimizes requested data, distinguishes GET visibility and retrieval from POST body submission without claiming transport security, and verifies changed name-value sets in an isolated local receiver.

conceptClusters.title: Persistent labels instructions descriptions and input purpose
exitEvidence: Learner provides persistent visible labels, exact programmatic association, shared and control-specific instructions, descriptions, visible-label-in-name agreement, and language-appropriate text across entered, autofilled, zoomed, and error states.

Learner chooses input type, inputmode, autocomplete detail tokens, name, and bounded constraints from data meaning; then verifies semantics, keyboard hint, autofill purpose, accepted international values, and submitted value separately.

conceptClusters.title: Exclusive and independent choice relationships
exitEvidence: Learner groups related choices with fieldset and legend, gives every option a label and explicit submitted value, uses shared radio names for exclusivity, and uses independent checkboxes for zero-to-many selection.
Learner verifies group and option names, keyboard movement, checked states, defaults, reordering, missing values, disabled choices, and exact changed submission entries.

conceptClusters.title: Multiline text selections options and form actions
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes textarea initial text from value attributes, select and option selectedness from placeholder-like prompts, single from multiple selection, optgroup labels from selectable options, and enabled from disabled submission.

Learner uses explicit submit and ordinary button types, rejects routine destructive reset, verifies the actual submitter and action overrides, and tests changed initial, current, selected, disabled, multiple, and submitted states.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An evidence map explains how an unseen intake purpose becomes native tasks, language scopes, hierarchy, form ownership, exact entry lists, labels, input purposes, choice relationships, multiline values, selections, and button behavior.
activityDesigns.startingState: A bounded intake brief, content outline, DOM excerpts, control traces, autofill metadata, interaction states, and isolated request captures are provided without decisions.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner predicts and explains all eight concepts under changed data, language, state, and submitter cases before guided authoring.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts the committed prediction with one observable DOM, accessibility, interaction, or request fact and never substitutes a finished form.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one transition at a time from collection purpose to control, name, state, entry, or behavior.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires a revised prediction and a smaller changed trace before the model continues.

interactions.title: Retrieve native task controls
interactions.learnerAction: Predict link, button, disclosure, text-entry, and choice controls from navigation, command, optional-information, entry, and selection tasks.

evidence.observable: Each choice supplies expected role, name, keyboard, focus, state, and result.
evidence.changedCase: A command becomes navigation and pointer input disappears.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual appearance or click handling chooses controls.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify the exact task outcome first.

interactions.title: Retrieve language scopes
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect primary form language and bounded translated instructions, option labels, and names for exact language-tag scope and pronunciation evidence.

evidence.observable: DOM and accessibility evidence expose primary and changed language without claiming translation.
evidence.changedCase: One shared instruction and three options change language.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible script or locale implies programmatic language.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mark primary and bounded language changes.

interactions.title: Retrieve form hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Predict page, form, step, and optional-section heading ranks after the intake outline gains a peer step and nested explanation.
interactions.artifactChange: A changed form outline is committed.

evidence.observable: Ranks follow content hierarchy with styles removed.
evidence.changedCase: A nested explanation becomes a peer step.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Fieldset legends or visual size replace headings.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reconstruct page hierarchy before ranks.

interactions.title: Predict form ownership and submitter
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which form owns each control and which submit button supplies action, method, name, and value in three changed DOM arrangements.
interactions.artifactChange: Ownership and submitter predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Form owner, active submitter, effective endpoint, method, and submitter entry match the DOM.
evidence.changedCase: A control moves outside the form and uses a form attribute.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual containment determines form ownership.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace form owner and activated submitter.

interactions.title: Inspect constructed entry lists
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect named, unnamed, enabled, disabled, checked, unchecked, selected, unselected, and submitter controls to derive the exact ordered entries.

evidence.observable: Every included and omitted name-value entry has the controlling rule.
evidence.changedCase: Names, checkedness, selectedness, disabled state, and submitter change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every visible current value is assumed submitted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Apply entry construction rules in tree order.

interactions.title: Inspect names and descriptions
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect visible labels, explicit and implicit association, accessible names, descriptions, shared instructions, placeholder text, entered values, and language scopes.
interactions.artifactChange: A label-description evidence table is saved.

evidence.observable: Every control retains persistent purpose and required format without relying on proximity or placeholder.
evidence.changedCase: Values and autofill replace every placeholder.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Adjacent text and placeholder are treated as labels.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace visible label, name, and description separately.

interactions.title: Predict input purpose behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict semantics, keyboard hint, autofill purpose, accepted value, constraint behavior, and submitted value for name, email, telephone, date, number-like, and free-text data.

evidence.observable: Type, inputmode, autocomplete, name, constraints, and values follow data meaning independently.
evidence.changedCase: Telephone-like identifier becomes arithmetic quantity.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Input type only changes visual appearance.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate meaning, entry aid, autofill, validation, and data.

interactions.title: Predict choice group behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict group and option names, keyboard movement, exclusive radio checkedness, independent checkbox states, default behavior, and submitted entries.

evidence.observable: Legend, labels, radio names, values, states, keyboard behavior, and entry list agree.
evidence.changedCase: Single choice becomes zero-to-many selection.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual proximity creates a choice group.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map group question, option identity, and cardinality.

interactions.title: Inspect multiline selection and buttons
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect textarea initial and current text, select option labels and values, selected and disabled states, multiple selection, optgroups, and explicit submit, reset, and ordinary button behavior.
interactions.artifactChange: A form-control state table is saved.

evidence.observable: Initial, current, selected, submitted, disabled, group, and button-result states remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Selection becomes multiple and button type is omitted.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Displayed option text and button label determine data and action.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace current state, explicit value, and button type.

interactions.title: Explain complete form-data model
interactions.learnerAction: Explain how task, language, hierarchy, ownership, submitter, entry list, labels, purpose metadata, choice relationships, control states, and buttons constrain one another.
interactions.artifactChange: The complete data-contract map becomes the model checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Every claim links purpose to DOM, interaction, accessible exposure, exact entry, and changed evidence.
evidence.changedCase: A multilingual volunteer form becomes a one-choice public request.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Form element inventory substitutes for data and behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild weakest claim from task through request capture.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A volunteer intake form accumulates native tasks, correct language and hierarchy, minimized submitted data, persistent labels, meaningful input metadata, coherent choice groups, multiline notes, selections, and explicit actions.
activityDesigns.startingState: A verified volunteer brief, data dictionary, language packet, content outline, isolated local receiver, changed-state cases, and minimal valid document are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved workflow passes all eight contracts, exact request captures, keyboard and touch tasks, autofill and entered states, changed data cases, narrow widths, and reload persistence.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names the first contradicted task, DOM, accessibility, state, entry-list, or request observable and withholds final markup.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints progress from collection requirement to one evidence layer to a smaller parallel field and never reveal the completed form.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires diagnosis, bounded repair, and a changed volunteer case before the original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Predict volunteer task controls
interactions.learnerAction: Predict native controls for navigation, submission, ordinary commands, text entry, exclusive choice, multiple choice, and optional information.

evidence.observable: Each control supplies task-appropriate semantics and behavior.
evidence.changedCase: One command becomes a destination.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All actions can use styled clickable containers.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify task outcome before element choice.

interactions.title: Code volunteer language scopes
interactions.learnerAction: Code primary document language and bounded translated field instructions and option labels without changing submitted codes.

evidence.observable: DOM and accessibility evidence expose correct language for every visible string.
evidence.changedCase: The translated instruction and option set change language.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible language is assumed from script or locale.
interactions.correctionRoute: Apply valid tags at exact scope boundaries.

interactions.title: Code volunteer form hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Code page, intake, step, and optional guidance headings from the content outline while keeping legends as group labels rather than replacement headings.

evidence.observable: Unstyled outline and heading navigation remain coherent.
evidence.changedCase: One intake step becomes nested guidance.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Legend rank or visual size drives hierarchy.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate page outline from control grouping.

interactions.title: Minimize collected volunteer data
interactions.learnerAction: Classify required, optional, derived, unnecessary, and prohibited intake fields from the bounded volunteer purpose before coding.
interactions.artifactChange: A data-minimization decision table is committed.

evidence.observable: Every requested field has a purpose and every unnecessary field is refused.
evidence.changedCase: Coordinator removes a scheduling requirement.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More collected fields are treated as future-proofing.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each field to a current task need.

interactions.title: Code form purpose and receiver
interactions.learnerAction: Code one form with explicit action and justified GET or POST method targeting the isolated receiver, without claiming client HTML provides server security.
interactions.artifactChange: Bounded form submission attributes are committed.

evidence.observable: Effective endpoint, method, navigation or body behavior, and local receiver match the purpose.
evidence.changedCase: Retrieval-style filter becomes intake creation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: POST is described as inherently encrypted or secure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate HTTP semantics, visibility, and transport security.

interactions.title: Name submitted controls
interactions.learnerAction: Assign stable non-empty data names and explicit values while avoiding built-in form-property names and leaving display-only content unnamed.
interactions.artifactChange: The submission data dictionary is committed.

evidence.observable: Names and values match receiver contract without DOM-clobbering collisions.
evidence.changedCase: Visible labels change while stable data keys remain.

interactions.feedbackTarget: IDs or visible labels are assumed submission names.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate identity, label, and data-key roles.

interactions.title: Inspect form owners
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect ancestor and explicit form associations for inside, outside, moved, and invalidly nested control arrangements.

evidence.observable: Each listed control resolves to the intended form or null owner.
evidence.changedCase: A control moves outside and its form ID changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual region always determines form owner.
interactions.correctionRoute: Resolve nearest form or explicit form attribute.

interactions.title: Predict successful entries
interactions.learnerAction: Predict exact entries for named, unnamed, disabled, checked, unchecked, selected, unselected, empty, and submitter controls.

evidence.observable: Ordered included and omitted entries match construction rules.
evidence.changedCase: Five controls change name, state, or enabledness.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every visible enabled value is included.
interactions.correctionRoute: Apply control-specific entry rules in tree order.

interactions.title: Capture volunteer submission
interactions.learnerAction: Submit through keyboard and pointer, capture the isolated request, and compare endpoint, method, submitter, entry order, names, and values with the prediction.
interactions.artifactChange: A real isolated request capture is stored.

evidence.observable: Observed request exactly matches the declared data contract.
evidence.changedCase: A different submit button and changed choices are used.

interactions.feedbackTarget: FormData code or DOM inspection substitutes for submission.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare prediction with receiver evidence field by field.

interactions.title: Test disabled and unnamed omission
interactions.learnerAction: Disable a fieldset, preserve its first legend behavior, remove names, and verify omitted entries and remaining interaction consequences.
interactions.artifactChange: Omission and disabled-state evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Disabled and unnamed controls omit entries by rule without being mistaken for readonly data.
evidence.changedCase: One omitted field becomes readonly and named.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Disabled, readonly, hidden, and unnamed are equivalent.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect mutability, focus, validation, and entry behavior.

interactions.title: Explain volunteer submission contract
interactions.learnerAction: Explain collection purpose, minimization, owner, action, method, submitter, name, value, state, every entry, omission, and changed request result.
interactions.artifactChange: A submission decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement to observed request evidence and limitation.
evidence.changedCase: Receiver contract removes one field and adds one submit action.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Markup inventory replaces request evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite one claim from purpose to captured entry.

interactions.title: Predict persistent label needs
interactions.learnerAction: Predict visible labels, group labels, shared instructions, format examples, descriptions, and intentionally redundant or non-label text from the intake brief.

evidence.observable: Every input purpose and required format remains visible and programmatically related.
evidence.changedCase: A self-evident search-like field becomes ambiguous intake data.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Placeholder or nearby heading labels every control.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate control, group, and instruction text.

interactions.title: Code explicit control labels
interactions.learnerAction: Code persistent visible labels whose for values exactly match unique control IDs and whose text remains in accessible names.

evidence.observable: Visible label, accessible name, click target, speech phrase, and unique association agree.
evidence.changedCase: Control order and visible wording change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Proximity or title attribute is accepted routinely.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace exact label-control association and name.

interactions.title: Code shared and specific instructions
interactions.learnerAction: Code shared form instructions plus control-specific format, purpose, and optionality descriptions with visible text and exact programmatic references.

evidence.observable: Names remain concise while descriptions provide the right extra information in the right language.
evidence.changedCase: Format and language change for one field.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All instructions are stuffed into accessible names.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate name, group context, and description.

interactions.title: Inspect name and description computation
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect visible label, accessible name source, description source, group context, language, required indication, and placeholder for every control.
interactions.artifactChange: An accessible naming audit is saved.

evidence.observable: Every control is identifiable without visual proximity and visible label remains within its name.
evidence.changedCase: ARIA label overrides a visible label on one control.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Any non-empty accessible name passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Preserve visible wording and required context.

interactions.title: Test entered and autofilled states
interactions.learnerAction: Enter and autofill values, then verify labels, instructions, descriptions, group context, and language remain visible and programmatically available.

evidence.observable: Purpose and format remain available after placeholder disappearance and value replacement.
evidence.changedCase: All fields receive long autofilled values.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Empty-state screenshot proves persistent labeling.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test every control after values are present.

interactions.title: Test label activation and reflow
interactions.learnerAction: Activate labels by pointer and touch, zoom, narrow, increase text, change language length, and verify target size, association, reading order, and no clipping.
interactions.artifactChange: Label activation and reflow evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Labels activate intended controls and all text remains readable at supported widths.
evidence.changedCase: Translated labels double in length.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Desktop visual alignment proves label usability.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect association, activation, and content reflow.

interactions.title: Explain label architecture
interactions.learnerAction: Explain each visible label, name source, description, shared instruction, group context, language scope, required cue, placeholder rejection, and changed-state result.
interactions.artifactChange: A label-description decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Each claim links user need to persistent visual and programmatic evidence.
evidence.changedCase: A format instruction becomes group-wide.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Accessible name existence substitutes for clarity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite one claim through entered and zoomed states.

interactions.title: Classify volunteer data meaning
interactions.learnerAction: Classify personal name, email, telephone, postal code, date availability, numeric quantity, identifier, and free text before input selection.

evidence.observable: Every field distinguishes data semantics from desired keyboard or visual shape.
evidence.changedCase: Numeric-looking identifier becomes an arithmetic quantity.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Character shape alone determines input type.
interactions.correctionRoute: Ask what operations and meaning the value has.

interactions.title: Code semantic input types
interactions.learnerAction: Code input types from data meaning and preserve realistic international email, telephone, name, and address values without overrestrictive patterns.

evidence.observable: Role, browser behavior, accepted edge cases, and submitted values match meaning.
evidence.changedCase: International telephone and name examples change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Narrow ASCII patterns are accepted as data quality.
interactions.correctionRoute: Remove unjustified constraints and retest edge cases.

interactions.title: Code keyboard hints separately
interactions.learnerAction: Add inputmode only where a keyboard hint helps text entry without changing the semantic type or guaranteeing a keyboard layout.

evidence.observable: Semantic type and inputmode purpose remain distinct across devices.
evidence.changedCase: Text identifier requires leading zeros and letters.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Inputmode validates or transforms the submitted value.
interactions.correctionRoute: Treat it only as a user-agent entry hint.

interactions.title: Code precise autocomplete purpose
interactions.learnerAction: Add valid autocomplete section, shipping or billing, and detail tokens only for fields whose user-data purpose matches the fixed taxonomy.

evidence.observable: Tokens identify exact user-data purposes independently of visible language and type.
evidence.changedCase: Volunteer email becomes another person's contact email.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Email type implies whose email is collected.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match exact field purpose to valid tokens.

interactions.title: Inspect purpose layers
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect label, language, type, inputmode, autocomplete tokens, name, current value, constraints, validation state, and submitted value as separate layers.
interactions.artifactChange: An input-purpose layer audit is saved.

evidence.observable: No one attribute is credited for another layer's behavior.
evidence.changedCase: Type, purpose, and submitted name diverge intentionally.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One correct type proves full field correctness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify each semantic, aid, and data layer.

interactions.title: Test autofill purpose and persistence
interactions.learnerAction: Use controlled autofill fixtures, inspect populated purpose, retain visible labels and instructions, and compare current and submitted values without exposing real personal data.
interactions.artifactChange: Autofill purpose and submission evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Correct fixture populates intended field and exact value enters the request.
evidence.changedCase: Billing and shipping sections exchange order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser autofill success is assumed from token presence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use deterministic fictional fixtures and request capture.

interactions.title: Test international input cases
interactions.learnerAction: Enter changed names, email addresses, telephone numbers, postal formats, decimals, dates, and identifiers while checking acceptance, keyboard hints, messages, and exact submission.

evidence.observable: Valid diverse values remain accepted for the right semantic reason.
evidence.changedCase: Locale, script, punctuation, and numeric format change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One domestic example proves realistic input support.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest constraints against actual data requirements.

interactions.title: Explain volunteer input metadata
interactions.learnerAction: Explain data meaning, type, inputmode, autocomplete purpose, name, constraints, accepted edge cases, keyboard evidence, autofill evidence, and submitted value for every input.
interactions.artifactChange: An input-purpose decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Every field claim connects collection purpose to separate observed layers.
evidence.changedCase: A numeric-looking field changes business meaning.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Attribute list replaces behavioral evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite one field from meaning to request capture.

interactions.title: Classify choice cardinality
interactions.learnerAction: Classify exactly-one, zero-or-one, zero-to-many, and independent yes-no volunteer decisions before choosing radio, checkbox, select, or another control.

evidence.observable: Control pattern follows number of allowed selections and task presentation.
evidence.changedCase: Exactly one availability choice becomes multiple days.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Number of visible options alone chooses pattern.
interactions.correctionRoute: Define minimum and maximum selections first.

interactions.title: Code exclusive radio groups
interactions.learnerAction: Code related radios in fieldset and legend with one shared non-empty name, unique IDs, persistent option labels, and explicit submitted values.

evidence.observable: Group name, option names, arrow behavior, one checked state, and one entry pass.
evidence.changedCase: Options reorder and default changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual row and similar names imply exclusivity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect fieldset, legend, shared name, and values.

interactions.title: Code independent checkbox sets
interactions.learnerAction: Code zero-to-many availability and independent consent choices with group context, option labels, stable names or values, and no forced selection.

evidence.observable: Each checked box contributes intended data and unchecked boxes do not.
evidence.changedCase: One checkbox becomes a required independent confirmation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All checkboxes in one fieldset share one state.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map each independent proposition and entry.

interactions.title: Inspect group and option names
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect fieldset group name, legend language, each option's visible and accessible name, checked state, disabled state, and submitted code without concatenating everything into option names.
interactions.artifactChange: A choice naming audit is saved.

evidence.observable: Group context and concise option identity are both available in correct language.
evidence.changedCase: Legend and one option change language.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Adjacent heading provides programmatic group name.
interactions.correctionRoute: Associate group and options at their own levels.

interactions.title: Test choice keyboard behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Use Tab, arrow keys, Space, touch, and pointer to enter groups, move radio selection, toggle checkboxes, preserve focus, and observe state.

evidence.observable: Native focus, exclusive movement, independent toggling, and labels work across inputs.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer is removed and choices reorder.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Clicking every option proves operability.
interactions.correctionRoute: Run complete native group interaction paths.

interactions.title: Test changed choice submission
interactions.learnerAction: Change defaults, order, values, checkedness, disabled choices, and selection count; submit and compare exact entries with the choice contract.

evidence.observable: Only intended current enabled checked choices produce exact entries.
evidence.changedCase: Radio becomes checkbox set and values change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: UI state screenshot substitutes for request data.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare each state to constructed entries.

interactions.title: Explain volunteer choice systems
interactions.learnerAction: Explain cardinality, grouping, legend, option labels, names, values, keyboard behavior, defaults, disabled states, reordering, and changed submission results.
interactions.artifactChange: A choice-group decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Each choice claim links task relationship to interaction and entry evidence.
evidence.changedCase: One selection rule changes after stakeholder review.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Control type name substitutes for group evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite one group from cardinality to request capture.

interactions.title: Code volunteer notes textarea
interactions.learnerAction: Code a labeled textarea with initial text in element content only when justified, bounded dimensions and length guidance, and a stable submission name.

evidence.observable: Initial, current, wrapped display, length, accessible purpose, and submitted text remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Initial prompt is removed and multiline content grows.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Textarea value attribute supplies initial text.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use element content and inspect current value.

interactions.title: Code role and location selects
interactions.learnerAction: Code labeled single and multiple select controls with explicit option values, justified placeholder-like prompt, optgroups for real categories, and correct selected and disabled states.

evidence.observable: Group labels, option labels, values, selectedness, disabledness, cardinality, and entries agree.
evidence.changedCase: Single selection becomes multiple and categories change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Displayed option text always equals submitted value.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace label, explicit value, state, and entry.

interactions.title: Code explicit button types
interactions.learnerAction: Code a clear submit button and ordinary preview command with explicit types, refuse routine reset, and keep button text within accessible names.

evidence.observable: Submit creates request, ordinary button does not, and no destructive reset is exposed.
evidence.changedCase: Ordinary command moves inside the form and type is omitted.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Buttons do nothing without click handlers.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect default and explicit form behavior.

interactions.title: Inspect current and default states
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect textarea default versus current value, option default versus current selectedness, multiple states, disabled options, reset consequences, and activated submitter.

evidence.observable: Every initial, current, enabled, selected, and submitter state is independently identified.
evidence.changedCase: Script changes current state after user edits.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Current visual state is assumed identical to markup defaults.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare attributes, properties, interaction, and entries.

interactions.title: Test multiline and select entries
interactions.learnerAction: Enter multiline text, change single and multiple selections, disable options, submit through each action, and compare exact normalized values and entries.
interactions.artifactChange: Multiline, selection, and submitter request captures are stored.

evidence.observable: Request data reflects current normalized text, enabled selected values, and activated submitter only.
evidence.changedCase: Newlines, selected count, disabled state, and submitter change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Control appearance proves submitted data.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare each control state to receiver entries.

interactions.title: Explain complex control behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Explain textarea initial and current text, select groups and options, states, multiple entries, explicit button types, reset refusal, submitter identity, and changed request outcomes.
interactions.artifactChange: A complex-control decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Every claim links user task, control state, interaction, and captured data.
evidence.changedCase: Selection cardinality and action set change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Element attributes substitute for runtime and request evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite one control from task through entry list.

interactions.title: Run complete volunteer workflow
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, change language, reorder headings and choices, autofill, enter international values, disable fields, change selections and submitter, zoom, narrow, and capture all requests.
interactions.artifactChange: The workflow and full regression suite become the workshop checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Saved tasks, languages, hierarchy, labels, metadata, states, controls, and exact entries survive every mutation.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel intake reverses data, language, and control requirements.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Initial visual form submission is treated as completion.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace first broken invariant from task to request.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A partially scaffolded workshop-registration form becomes a distinct, accessible data workflow through fading support and changed-case request checks.
activityDesigns.startingState: A different registration brief, incomplete hierarchy, mixed-language instructions, partial data dictionary, broken labels, unfinished controls, and isolated receiver are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner completes all eight concepts with concept-level prompts and transfers them to a changed workshop schedule.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names failed evidence after commitment and never supplies final field, option, name, value, or repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints begin at requirement category and fade to changed-case questions; completed code is never shown.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires smaller parallel correction and changed registration case before retry.

interactions.title: Complete registration task controls
interactions.learnerAction: Complete native navigation, commands, disclosures, entry fields, choices, and submission controls from changed registration tasks.

evidence.observable: Role, name, keyboard, focus, state, and result match every task.
evidence.changedCase: A preview command becomes a destination.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual styling chooses control behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify exact task outcome before control.

interactions.title: Code registration language scopes
interactions.learnerAction: Code primary language plus bounded translated instructions and choices while preserving stable submitted codes.

evidence.observable: DOM and accessibility evidence expose exact primary and changed languages.
evidence.changedCase: Translated option set changes language.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible script or locale implies language.
interactions.correctionRoute: Apply valid tags at exact text boundaries.

interactions.title: Complete registration hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Complete page, registration, session, and optional-guidance headings without treating legends as page headings.

evidence.observable: Unstyled outline follows content hierarchy and remains distinct from control groups.
evidence.changedCase: One session group becomes nested guidance.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Legend or fieldset depth sets heading rank.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate outline hierarchy from group labeling.

interactions.title: Complete registration submission contract
interactions.learnerAction: Complete minimized fields, form owner, action, method, stable names, explicit values, and submitter data from receiver requirements.

evidence.observable: Purpose, owner, effective request, names, values, and submitter match receiver contract.
evidence.changedCase: Receiver removes one field and adds a second action.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible controls define request automatically.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace purpose through owner and entry contract.

interactions.title: Test changed registration entries
interactions.learnerAction: Change names, disabled states, checkedness, selectedness, empty values, form ownership, and submitter; capture exact isolated requests.
interactions.artifactChange: Changed registration request captures are stored.

evidence.observable: Included and omitted ordered entries match rules and active submitter.
evidence.changedCase: Control states and ownership change again.

interactions.feedbackTarget: DOM values or FormData prediction replace submission.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare every predicted entry to receiver capture.

interactions.title: Complete persistent registration labels
interactions.learnerAction: Complete visible labels, group labels, shared instructions, specific descriptions, required cues, and exact associations in correct languages.

evidence.observable: Every purpose and format survives values, autofill, zoom, and language change.

interactions.title: Test label activation and persistence

interactions.artifactChange: Label persistence and activation evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Purpose, format, target, reading order, and language remain correct in all states.
evidence.changedCase: All controls receive long values and reordered labels.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Empty desktop screenshot proves labels.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest after entered and translated states.

interactions.title: Code registration input purposes
interactions.learnerAction: Code type, inputmode, autocomplete, name, and bounded constraints from attendee-name, email, telephone, date, identifier, quantity, and free-text meaning.

evidence.observable: Semantics, keyboard hint, autofill purpose, acceptance, and submitted values remain distinct and correct.
evidence.changedCase: Numeric identifier becomes arithmetic quantity.

interactions.title: Test registration input transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Use fictional autofill plus international names, email, telephone, dates, quantities, and identifiers; inspect behavior and exact submitted values.
interactions.artifactChange: Input transfer and request evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Valid diverse values remain accepted and enter intended fields and entries.
evidence.changedCase: Locale, script, punctuation, and purpose change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One domestic example proves input quality.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest every metadata layer against changed data.

interactions.title: Code registration choice relationships

evidence.observable: Group and option names, keyboard behavior, states, cardinality, and entries agree.

evidence.observable: Current enabled checked states and exact entries follow changed selection rules.
evidence.changedCase: Option language and selection minimum change.

interactions.correctionRoute: Retest group context, input path, state, and entries.

interactions.title: Code registration notes selections and actions

evidence.observable: Initial and current text, option states, multiple entries, disabledness, and button results agree.
evidence.changedCase: Single select becomes multiple and command moves inside form.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible option text and button labels define data and behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace state, explicit value, and button type.

interactions.title: Test registration control states

interactions.title: Run registration mutation suite
interactions.learnerAction: Change tasks, language, hierarchy, receiver fields, labels, data purposes, choice cardinality, control states, and submitter in one unseen registration.

evidence.observable: Each changed invariant receives bounded repair and saved requests remain exact.
evidence.changedCase: All mutations recur in different order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad form rewrite is accepted as transfer.

interactions.title: Explain registration transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Explain all eight concepts, decisions, evidence, corrections, access checks, data minimization, request captures, and one parallel registration transfer without workshop notes.

evidence.observable: Every claim links task and data purpose to behavior, accessibility, entry list, and mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A broken intake form gains minimal causal repairs and an incident report spanning native tasks, language, hierarchy, entry lists, labels, input purposes, choice groups, and complex controls.
activityDesigns.startingState: Form contains clickable divs, wrong language, skipped headings, wrong owner and method, unnamed fields, placeholder labels, invalid autocomplete, broken groups, accidental submission, and destructive reset.
activityDesigns.completionState: Every fault has earliest cause, direct accessibility or request evidence, minimal repair, preserved unaffected behavior, and changed parallel incident.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback identifies contradicted DOM, accessibility, input, state, entry-list, or request evidence without revealing repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: On-request hints narrow incident to one concept and smaller parallel trace.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires cause classification, minimal repair, regression evidence, and changed fault before checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Predict prerequisite failures
interactions.learnerAction: Predict outcomes for clickable divs, wrong language scopes, skipped headings, and legends misused as page headings before inspection.

evidence.observable: Predictions map to task, keyboard, focus, pronunciation, scope, outline, and navigation evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Faults move into different form sections.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All defects are called generic accessibility failures.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify control, language, and hierarchy separately.

interactions.title: Repair submission contract failures
interactions.learnerAction: Repair wrong form owner, accidental GET exposure, unnecessary fields, missing and colliding names, wrong values, disabled-state assumptions, and lost submitter data.

evidence.observable: Purpose, owner, effective request, exact entries, omissions, and submitter pass.
evidence.changedCase: Receiver fields, ownership, states, and submitter change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Form visually submits, so data contract passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare constructed entries with isolated capture.

interactions.title: Repair unlabelled and overwritten controls
interactions.learnerAction: Repair placeholder-only fields, mismatched for and id, duplicate IDs, vague labels, ARIA override hiding visible words, missing group context, and instructions unavailable after entry.
interactions.artifactChange: Label and instruction faults receive bounded repairs.

evidence.observable: Visible label, accessible name, description, group, language, activation, entered state, and zoom pass.
evidence.changedCase: Labels translate and values autofill.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Any non-empty name or nearby text passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace persistent visible and programmatic relationships.

interactions.title: Repair input purpose mismatches
interactions.learnerAction: Repair semantic type chosen for keyboard shape, invalid autocomplete, wrong person's purpose, inputmode treated as validation, domestic-only patterns, and numeric identifiers losing zeros.

evidence.observable: Meaning, entry aid, autofill, accepted international cases, and submitted values pass separately.
evidence.changedCase: Identifier becomes quantity and user-data owner changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Correct-looking keyboard or type proves field correctness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify data meaning and each metadata layer.

interactions.title: Repair choice relationship failures
interactions.learnerAction: Repair visually grouped radios with different names, checkboxes forced exclusive, missing fieldset and legend, unlabeled options, implicit on values, wrong defaults, and disabled choices assumed submitted.

evidence.observable: Group and option names, cardinality, keyboard behavior, state, values, and exact entries pass.
evidence.changedCase: Exclusive choice becomes multiple and options reorder.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual proximity and control type establish relationship.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map group question, cardinality, states, and entries.

interactions.title: Repair complex control failures
interactions.learnerAction: Repair textarea value attribute, ambiguous select prompt, missing explicit option values, false selected assumptions, disabled option entries, accidental default submit button, and destructive reset.

evidence.observable: Initial and current values, selectedness, disabledness, entries, submitter, and action results pass.
evidence.changedCase: Select becomes multiple and ordinary command moves inside form.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Displayed labels and markup defaults prove behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect current state, explicit values, and button types.

interactions.title: Inspect repaired form layers
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect task, language, hierarchy, form owner, label, name, description, type, inputmode, autocomplete, group, current state, value, submitter, and entry list for contradictions.

evidence.observable: All eight evidence layers agree and no repair masks another fault.
evidence.changedCase: Fields reorder and data purpose changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered form screenshot is complete evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare every consumer, state, and request layer.

interactions.title: Test keyboard language and reflow
interactions.learnerAction: Complete form by keyboard, switch translated content, autofill, increase text, zoom, narrow, and verify labels, groups, focus, controls, values, and no clipping.
interactions.artifactChange: Input-path and responsive regression evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: All tasks and information remain operable and understandable across access changes.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer disappears and translated labels triple.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tab reachability and desktop layout pass.
interactions.correctionRoute: Run complete tasks under every changed condition.

interactions.title: Run changed request regression
interactions.learnerAction: Change owners, names, disabledness, autofill, inputs, choices, text, options, submitter, save, reload, and capture every repaired request.
interactions.artifactChange: Complete incident request suite is stored.

evidence.observable: Repaired behavior and exact entries survive mutations and reload.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel incident changes every fault location.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One happy-path submission passes clinic.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace first request mismatch to earliest cause.

interactions.title: Write form incident report
interactions.learnerAction: Explain each requirement, cause, contradicted evidence, minimal repair, preserved invariant, changed case, data limitation, and request result across all eight concepts.
interactions.artifactChange: Repaired form and causal report become clinic checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Report demonstrates causal diagnosis rather than attribute substitution.
evidence.changedCase: Second form repeats mechanisms in new data contexts.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Report lists changed attributes without causes or request evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest incident as invariant and capture.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently built community-class request form collects only needed data through persistent multilingual labels, purpose-appropriate inputs, coherent choices, multiline requests, selections, explicit actions, and exact isolated submissions.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unseen class-program brief, fictional data dictionary, language packet, content outline, receiver contract, state mutations, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Saved form passes all eight contracts, exact changed requests, keyboard and touch tasks, autofill fixtures, international values, narrow widths, persistence, and stakeholder defense without copied structure.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports only unmet observable and user or data consequence; it supplies no final field, label, metadata, option, name, value, or code.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints available only on request and point to one evidence layer or smaller parallel class-request case.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires independent diagnosis, minimal repair, and changed request case before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Build native class-request tasks

evidence.observable: Role, name, keyboard, focus, state, disabled behavior, and result match each task.
evidence.changedCase: One command becomes navigation and script fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Styled click targets are accepted as native parity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify result and inventory native behavior.

interactions.title: Build language and hierarchy

interactions.title: Build minimized request contract

interactions.feedbackTarget: Collecting extra data is accepted for future use.

interactions.title: Test exact class requests

evidence.observable: Every included and omitted entry matches construction rule and receiver contract.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible filled controls are assumed submitted.

interactions.title: Build persistent class labels
interactions.learnerAction: Build visible explicit labels, group legends, shared instructions, specific descriptions, format examples, required cues, and correct language associations.

interactions.title: Test labels across states

interactions.artifactChange: Class label state and reflow evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Every control remains identifiable, operable, and understandable in all states.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Empty desktop layout proves labeling.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest entered, translated, zoomed, and narrow states.

interactions.title: Build class input purposes
interactions.learnerAction: Build type, inputmode, autocomplete, name, and bounded constraints from requester, contact, date, identifier, quantity, and free-text meanings without excluding valid international data.

evidence.observable: Semantics, keyboard hint, autofill purpose, acceptance, validation, and submitted value agree independently.
evidence.changedCase: Another person's contact becomes requester's contact.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Input type or keyboard shape proves field purpose.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate meaning, aid, purpose token, constraint, and entry.

interactions.title: Test class input diversity
interactions.learnerAction: Use fictional autofill and changed international names, emails, telephones, postal formats, dates, quantities, and identifiers; capture resulting entries.
interactions.artifactChange: Input diversity and request evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Valid diverse values enter intended controls and requests without unjustified rejection.
evidence.changedCase: Locale, script, punctuation, data owner, and numeric meaning change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One local example proves input completeness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest every metadata layer against real meaning.

interactions.title: Build class choice groups

evidence.observable: Group and option names, cardinality, keyboard behavior, states, values, and entries agree.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual proximity creates choice semantics.

interactions.title: Test class choice transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Use keyboard and touch, reorder choices, change defaults and values, disable options, switch cardinality, translate labels, submit, and compare exact entries.
interactions.artifactChange: Choice interaction and request evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Group context, native state changes, and current enabled checked entries follow new rules.
evidence.changedCase: Choice order, language, default, and minimum change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Clicked visual state proves group and data behavior.

interactions.title: Build request details selections and actions
interactions.learnerAction: Build textarea details, single and multiple selects with meaningful optgroups and explicit option values, plus explicit submit and ordinary action buttons without destructive reset.

evidence.observable: Initial and current text, option grouping and states, multiple entries, disabledness, and button results agree.
evidence.changedCase: Single select becomes multiple and action moves into form.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Displayed control text defines values and button action.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace current state, explicit value, and button type.

interactions.title: Test complex request states
interactions.learnerAction: Change textarea newlines, option groups and values, selected and disabled states, multiple selection, ordinary action, and submitter; capture exact requests.
interactions.artifactChange: Complex-control state and request evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Normalized current text, enabled selected values, and activated submitter produce intended entries.
evidence.changedCase: Defaults, current states, selected count, and submitter all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Markup defaults or screenshot prove submission.

interactions.title: Test persistence and complete request path
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, complete form by keyboard and touch, switch languages, autofill, enter data, change choices and selections, submit through each action, and compare captures.
interactions.artifactChange: End-to-end persistence and request suite is stored.

evidence.observable: Saved structure, access, state, data, actions, and exact requests survive full task paths.
evidence.changedCase: Task order reverses after reload.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Single pointer submission proves workflow.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace complete task from heading to receiver.

interactions.title: Run adversarial class-request mutation
interactions.learnerAction: Change task outcomes, language, hierarchy, receiver contract, ownership, labels, data meanings, choice cardinality, complex states, and submitter without broad rewrite.
interactions.artifactChange: Complete adversarial regression report is stored.

evidence.observable: All eight contracts pass with minimal repairs and exact new requests.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel class program reverses every mutation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original happy path is accepted as transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Isolate first failed contract and preserve others.

interactions.title: Defend class-request design
interactions.learnerAction: Defend every task control, language, heading, collected or refused field, owner, request, label, metadata, choice, complex state, action, access result, and mutation.
interactions.artifactChange: Class-request form and evidence-backed defense become lab checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement, decision or refusal, observed behavior, exact entry, consequence, and changed case.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder requests extra data, placeholder labels, domestic patterns, and reset button.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Defense lists tags without user or request evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest claim from need through receiver.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A delayed retrieval record demonstrates all eight concepts across unseen tasks, languages, outlines, label traces, metadata, choice states, controls, and request captures without earlier artifacts.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen form briefs, outlines, DOM traces, accessibility evidence, autofill metadata, interaction states, and isolated requests are provided without notes.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner retrieves all eight concepts, corrects misconceptions causally, and transfers them after delay.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names missed concept and observable only after commitment and never supplies final markup or entry list.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Optional retrieval hints point to one evidence layer or smaller parallel item without revealing answer.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to one concept-sized correction and different changed item before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Retrieve native task selection
interactions.learnerAction: Choose native controls for unseen navigation, command, disclosure, entry, selection, and submission tasks and name each behavior contract.

evidence.observable: Role, name, keyboard, focus, state, result, and failure behavior follow task.
evidence.changedCase: Command becomes destination and script fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role and click handler create native parity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify task and inventory responsibilities.

interactions.title: Retrieve language scopes
interactions.learnerAction: Mark primary and bounded language changes for unseen labels, instructions, legends, options, and buttons without changing stable data codes.

evidence.observable: DOM and accessibility scopes match every visible string.
evidence.changedCase: Option and instruction language changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Script appearance determines language automatically.
interactions.correctionRoute: Apply valid scope to exact human-language runs.

interactions.title: Retrieve form hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Reconstruct page, form, step, and guidance heading ranks while keeping legends as group labels in an unseen request form.

evidence.observable: Unstyled outline matches content hierarchy after group changes.
evidence.changedCase: A form step becomes nested guidance.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Fieldset depth determines headings.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate outline from control grouping.

interactions.title: Predict unseen entry list
interactions.learnerAction: Predict form owner, effective action and method, submitter, and ordered entries for named, unnamed, disabled, checked, selected, empty, and moved controls.

evidence.observable: Prediction exactly matches isolated request and omission rules.
evidence.changedCase: Owner, states, names, and submitter change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every visible value is assumed submitted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Construct entries from owner and current state.

interactions.title: Correct submission overclaims
interactions.learnerAction: Correct extra data collection, POST-is-secure claim, visual ownership, unnamed-field inclusion, disabled-versus-readonly confusion, DOM-clobbering name, and missing submitter entry.

evidence.observable: Purpose, limitation, owner, names, states, submitter, and request evidence all pass.
evidence.changedCase: Receiver and data needs change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Switching method or adding names solves every issue.
interactions.correctionRoute: Correct each data-contract layer independently.

interactions.title: Retrieve label and description layers
interactions.learnerAction: Map visible labels, accessible names, descriptions, group context, shared instructions, required cues, placeholders, and language scopes for unseen controls.

evidence.observable: Purpose and format persist after entry, autofill, zoom, and translation.
evidence.changedCase: ARIA override and placeholder disappearance occur.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Any accessible name or nearby text is enough.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace visible label, name, description, and group.

interactions.title: Predict input purpose layers
interactions.learnerAction: Predict type, inputmode, autocomplete purpose, name, accepted edge cases, validation behavior, and submitted value for unseen data meanings.

evidence.observable: Every layer follows meaning and remains separately verified.
evidence.changedCase: Identifier becomes quantity and data owner changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Type alone proves field correctness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate semantics, aid, purpose, constraint, and entry.

interactions.title: Correct input metadata misuse
interactions.learnerAction: Correct keyboard-driven type choice, invalid autocomplete, wrong person's token, inputmode validation claim, domestic-only patterns, and lost leading zeros.

evidence.observable: Meaning, international acceptance, autofill, keyboard hint, and request data pass.
evidence.changedCase: Locale and business meaning change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Changing type repairs every metadata layer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Correct each layer from actual data purpose.

interactions.title: Retrieve choice relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Derive cardinality, fieldset, legend, option labels, radio names, checkbox independence, values, defaults, disabled states, keyboard behavior, and entries for unseen choices.

evidence.observable: Group context, option identity, state behavior, and exact entries agree.
evidence.changedCase: Exclusive choice becomes multiple and options reorder.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual proximity forms a group.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map question, cardinality, options, and data.

interactions.title: Correct broken choice data
interactions.learnerAction: Correct different-name radios, same-name independent checkboxes, missing legend, vague options, implicit on values, false defaults, and disabled entries.

evidence.observable: Group, option, keyboard, state, values, and request evidence pass.
evidence.changedCase: Cardinality and default change again.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Control-type swap alone repairs relationships.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild from selection rule through entries.

interactions.title: Correct complex control states
interactions.learnerAction: Correct textarea value misuse, ambiguous prompt option, missing values, false selected assumptions, disabled entry, accidental default submit, and destructive reset.

evidence.observable: Initial, current, selected, disabled, multiple, action, submitter, and request states pass.
evidence.changedCase: Single select becomes multiple and action moves.

interactions.title: Explain delayed form-data model
interactions.learnerAction: Explain all eight concepts, dependencies, common confusions, observable evidence, corrections, data limitations, and one unseen transfer without notes.

evidence.observable: Explanation links purpose, structure, accessibility, interaction, state, entries, request, and mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently completed mutual-aid request form demonstrates all eight concepts through answers, code, causal debugging, exact requests, persistence, transfer, and defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unseen mutual-aid brief, fictional data dictionary, language packet, content tree, receiver contract, deterministic faults, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Candidate independently demonstrates all eight concepts under original and changed conditions with no instructional assistance.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Assessment feedback records only pass or failed requirement and observable; no canonical field, label, metadata, option, name, value, entry list, or repair is disclosed.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No instructional hints, staged clues, example answers, or code completion are available during checkpoint.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed item closes and records its evidence gap for later relearning plus different parallel assessment form.

interactions.learnerAction: Choose type, inputmode, autocomplete, name, and bounded constraints for unseen personal, contact, date, identifier, quantity, and free-text meanings.

interactions.correctionRoute: Record input-purpose evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug input metadata and diversity
interactions.learnerAction: Repair wrong type, invalid autocomplete, wrong person purpose, inputmode overclaim, domestic-only patterns, lost leading zeros, and mismatched submitted name; test fictional autofill and international values.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent input repairs and changed data evidence are committed.

evidence.observable: Semantics, hints, autofill, diverse acceptance, and exact entries pass.
evidence.changedCase: Locale, script, purpose, and punctuation change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Changing type alone repairs field.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record input-layer evidence gap.

interactions.title: Design request choice relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Derive cardinality, grouping, legends, option labels, radio names, checkbox independence, explicit values, defaults, and disabled-state meaning for unseen choices.

evidence.observable: Question, cardinality, group, options, states, native behavior, and entries agree.
evidence.changedCase: Exclusive choice becomes zero-to-many.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual adjacency and control count define group.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record choice-relationship evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug request choice behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Repair different-name radios, forced-exclusive checkboxes, missing legend, vague labels, implicit values, false defaults, and disabled entries; test keyboard, touch, reordering, and exact request.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent choice repairs and request evidence are committed.

evidence.observable: Group context, option identity, native state changes, and current enabled entries pass.
evidence.changedCase: Choices reorder, translate, and change cardinality.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Control-type swap alone repairs group.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record choice-behavior evidence gap.

interactions.title: Plan complex request controls
interactions.learnerAction: Plan textarea initial state, single and multiple selects, option and optgroup labels, explicit values, selected and disabled states, submit and ordinary actions, and reset refusal.

evidence.observable: Initial, current, grouped, selected, disabled, multiple, action, and entry states are explicit.
evidence.changedCase: Single select becomes multiple and command moves inside form.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Displayed text defines values and action.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record complex-control evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug complex request states
interactions.learnerAction: Repair textarea value misuse, ambiguous prompt, missing option values, wrong selected assumptions, disabled inclusion, accidental submit, and destructive reset; mutate states and capture request.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent complex-control repairs and capture are committed.

evidence.observable: Normalized current text, enabled selections, explicit action behavior, submitter, and entries pass.
evidence.changedCase: Newlines, selections, disabled state, and submitter change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Markup defaults or screenshot prove behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record control-state evidence gap.

interactions.title: Solve adversarial request mutation
interactions.learnerAction: Diagnose and minimally repair simultaneous task, language, hierarchy, receiver, owner, label, input-purpose, choice, complex-state, and submitter changes; save, reload, and capture requests.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent eight-concept adversarial repairs are committed.

evidence.observable: All contracts and exact requests survive minimal repairs, access paths, and reload.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel form reverses every mutation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad rewrite hides causal evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record first failed invariant for relearning.

interactions.title: Defend form submission mastery
interactions.learnerAction: Defend every control, language, heading, collected or refused field, owner, request, label, metadata, choice, complex state, action, repair, access result, persistence result, and transfer without help.
interactions.artifactChange: Mutual-aid form and defense become independent assessment record.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement, decision or refusal, observed behavior, exact data, consequence, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel brief requests extra data, placeholder labels, restrictive patterns, custom choices, and reset.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tag inventory or visual form substitutes for mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record weakest claim for relearning and parallel form.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, privacy, security, internationalization, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.

Learner-facing copy, fictional data and autofill fixtures, isolated request receiver, canonical answers, executable checks, browser and assistive-technology verification, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
